ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "insurance" INTEGER /* Whether the shipping method includes insurance */,
  "transit_time" TEXT /* Transit time for the shipping method (e.g., 1-5 business days) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the shipping method */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* The carrier responsible for the shipping */,
  "max_weight" TEXT /* The maximum weight the shipping method can handle */,
  "min_order_value" TEXT /* The minimum order value required to qualify for the shipping method */,
  "max_order_value" TEXT /* The maximum order value the shipping method can handle */,
  "service_level" TEXT /* The service level of the shipping method (e.g., Standard, Expedited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method chosen for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., processing, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* The estimated date of delivery based on the chosen shipping method */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* The actual date the order was delivered */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* The tracking number for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* The source of the order (e.g., website, mobile app, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* The number of loyalty points the customer has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being updated */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the order (e.g., processing, shipped, delivered) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the status update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* The user or system that updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* The price per unit of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* The discount applied to the product */,
  "final_price" TEXT /* The final price of the product after discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the address (optional) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., shipping, billing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
